query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN avatarUrl IS NULL OR avatarUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_avatar, SUM(CASE WHEN avatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND avatarUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_avatar FROM contacts;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN avatarUrl IS NULL OR avatarUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_avatar, SUM(CASE WHEN avatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND avatarUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_avatar FROM contacts;
